commit.message:
Merge tag 'tags/jdk-27+22' into user/missa-prime/avx10_2

Added tag jdk-27+22 for changeset 322dedba
Switch back to short jumps instead of near jumps because loop alignment should be handled separately.
Re-combine code paths and use near jumps instead of short jumps to make compiler align loop block address to 32 bytes instead of 16 bytes.
Change the composition of the float and double arrays in the FpMinMaxIntrinsics.java file.
Split AVX10.2 and non-AVX10.2 min/max floating point reduction into separate code paths.
Extend dashed line to cover all commented text above emit_fp_min_max.
Add missing character at the beginning of function definition.
Adjust instruction sequence used by scalar floating point min/max reduction rules.
